name: Predaplant Heliamphorhynchus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕食植物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プレデター・プランツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヘリアンフォリンクス
desc: If your opponent controls a monster with a Predator Counter: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by your opponent's card: You can target 1 DARK Dragon or 1 DARK Plant monster in your GY, except "Predaplant Heliamphorhynchus"; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Heliamphorhynchus" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster with a Predator Counter: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by your opponent's card: You can target 1 DARK Dragon or 1 DARK Plant monster in your GY, except "Predaplant Heliamphorhynchus"; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Heliamphorhynchus" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
